resplit_currency_api_unit.command: npm ci && npm run generate && npm run test

resplit_currency_api_trust_preflight.note: Launch-trust lane: generates local cockpit, Cloudflare destination, Grafana, source-promotion, and local-agent trust artifacts. Exit 1 is expected yellow while proof is incomplete; exit 2 remains red/fail. Do not treat endpoint smoke as launch-green without this lane.

resplit_currency_api_ui.note: Live Worker/CDN smoke; this repo has no browser UI, so the UI lane is the user-facing FX contract smoke. The smoke script keeps strict date checks outside a narrow publish grace window and emits a warning when grace is active.
